prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: mid-depth bamboo-grove cutout for scene 2 of a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample and defines the bamboo and handmade paper language
Primary request: a loose band of slender bamboo trunks and leaf clusters along the upper-left and right edges, leaving the descending center path open
Style/medium: layered Chinese cut-paper, visible fibers, restrained ink, matte teal and tea-brown
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background
Constraints: uniform key background; no shadows, gradients or texture; no #ff00ff in subject; no people, text, watermark or logo; complete silhouettes
Avoid: wall of foliage, photorealism, glossy 3D
